assetKinds._comment: Asset extension signals the vendor shape: '.yml'/'.md' = single file vendored to its dest; '.zip' = a DIRECTORY vendored as a tree (expand on fetch). The lockfile drift anchor for '.zip' assets is a CANONICAL TREE HASH (sorted relative paths + per-file SHA256), not the zip's own SHA, since zip archives are not byte-reproducible.

_categories._comment: category = consumption intent. 'pipeline' = a building block composed INTO a pipeline (dest is consumer-chosen via the tooling's -Path). 'repoScaffold' = repo furniture STAMPED into a repo at a FIXED dest (source is dogfooded from this repo's own .github/).
_categories.repoScaffold: stamp into a repo at a fixed dest

registerModusOpsFeeds.description: Bootstrap a per-run SecretStore vault, store the SystemToken, register MAR + internal feeds with CredentialInfo + -CredentialProvider None + priority; unregister PSGallery unless allowed.

installModusOpsModules.description: Credential-agnostic install of modusOps / business modules (no token param). Always() teardown wipes the vault and repositories. The gh action inlines the GitHub Packages folder-casing fix.

sendTeamsChannelMessage.description: Post a success/failure/warning/note card to a Microsoft Teams channel webhook. (gh port untested on a live webhook.)

sendDiscordChannelMessage.description: Post a success/failure/warning/note embed to a Discord channel webhook.

prValidation.description: PR-gate workflow: lints azd + gh templates (structure / parameter / gh-action / secret) and blocks merge on gating issues.

release.description: Release workflow: on merge to main cuts the next rolling-integer tag (vN) and attaches the full template set + checksums.txt + manifest.json.

pullRequestTemplate.description: Simple pull-request template (what changed / checklist / release impact). N+-appropriate: no SemVer type-of-change matrix.

issueTemplates.description: Issue-form set (directory asset): a simple problem/template-request form + _config.yml (blank issues off, README link).

_sets._comment: A 'set' is a named bundle applied in one call (Add-MORepoScaffold). type 'archetype' = a curated, tested-together list of steps (each a 'file' member, or a 'provision' step deferred to P4); type 'selector' = a derived query over templates' category/kind, evaluated against THIS manifest version (late-bound but deterministic, since each released manifest is immutable and the lock pins the version).

templateLibrary.description: A modusOps template-library repo: PR-validation + rolling-integer release workflows + PR/issue furniture.

workflowSet.description: All repoScaffold workflow furniture for the platform (derived - auto-includes new workflow templates).
